creator: freebsd@amc-os.com
text:
Just to precise/acknowledge some points, as it seems some of my posts were 
not displayed :

- Forcing 32 bit mode in bge_chipinit fixed the problem as you supposed.
- The chip, even if reported as B5, seems consequently to have the supposed 
bug, and actually the chip is BCM5701TKHB TK0525 P13, so listed as bugged 
(A3).
- Clearly it doesn't work at all without the RX_ALIGNBUG fix, even there 
where PCI-X is presumedly not enabled, but I didn't check again after we 
found the bug for the PCI-X detection.

But now being forced like this it has no longer any kind of interest to have 
this card.. except the mobo has a separate PCI bus for the 2 64-bit slots so 
there should be less impact, but I hope you'll find a better solution anyway 
:)

Thanks,
Aurélien
